stakeholder_map.pipeline_run_scope: AI-assisted vendor onboarding pipeline — all agents and routing operations within a single pipeline run
stakeholder_map.checkoff_agent_note: This file is the primary input for the Checkoff Agent alongside the finalized checklist. It provides the role-to-stakeholder mapping, required approver list, escalation ownership, and routing guidance needed to produce stakeholder-ready next-step documents. The Checkoff Agent may not query any index endpoint — it consumes this file and assembled agent outputs only.
